Nepal.title: Nepal’s peace score takes historic hit after Gen Z unrest
Nepal.summary: The country’s 26-place fall in the Global Peace Index follows the deadly unrest last September, but experts say deeper weaknesses in governance, public trust, and democratic institutions are at the root of the decline.

Nepal.summary: From home healthcare and Braille-to-Unicode tools to AI-powered farming and tourism, young innovators unveil practical solutions at the ‘Code for Impact’ hackathon.

Nepal.title: Foreign tourists are staying longer, but spending less in Nepal
Nepal.summary: Average tourist stay hit a record 16.34 days in 2025, but daily spending fell to $33.09, the second-lowest on record. Hoteliers blame weak transport safety, price wars and political disruptions for keeping high-value travellers away despite a boom in luxury hospitality.

Nepal.title: For Kathmandu’s youths, running is about more than fitness

Nepal.title: The fear of being ‘cringe’

Nepal.title: Nepali pickles find their way to global markets
